name: Cilantro Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
3/4 cup cilantro leaves
1 tablespoon minced garlic
1 teaspoon salt
Freshly ground black pepper
2 pounds small new potatoes, cooked and halved (unpeeled)
1/3 cup finely minced onions
1. In a bowl, stir together the mayonnaise with cilantro, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the potatoes and onions and toss to combine thoroughly.
3. Cover and refrigerate up to 24 hours before serving.
Yield: 5 to 6 servings
